title: Milvus Community Talks
description: Welcome to our first Milvus Community Meetup, sponsored by [Zilliz](https://zilliz.com)! In this meetup, [Frank Liu](https://linkedin.com/in/fzliu) will talk about some of the latest features in the upcoming [Milvus 2.1 release](https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/releases) and [Rishav Ray](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rishavray/) will be talking about how Milvus helps power real-time recommendation at [Trell](https://trell.co/). **New Features in Milvus 2.1** We'll first briefly go over some of the differences between Milvus 2.x and Milvus 1.x before talking about some of the latest features in the upcoming version of Milvus. **Main Talk: Building a Real-Time Recommendation System with Milvus** Ever wondered how YouTube suggested videos update instantaneously or how Amazon updates recommendations based on your previous clicks/searches? The secret lies in real-time recommendation systems - tech stacks that allow companies to personalize a user's suggestions based on their previous history. In this talk, Rishav will discuss how Milvus can be used to build such an end-to-end real-time recommendation system.
